Localization.Description: A certificate has been requested that allows you to set an alternative SubjectAccountName parameter. Using this certificate will allow an attacker to impersonate another user, including the domain administrator

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} requested certificate "{object.name}" that allows to specify the alternative parameter SubjectAccountName on host {event_src.host}
Certificate "{object.name}" that allows to specify the alternative parameter SubjectAccountName was requested on host {event_src.host}
